headline: TTD Trades at a Discounted P/E: Should You Buy the Stock?
summary: TTD trades at 12.64X forward earnings, well below peers, as strong retention and AI-driven growth plans face macro pressure and near-term margin constraints.

headline: Nautic Partners Announces Sale of Property Management Company AKAM
summary: PROVIDENCE, R.I. & NEW YORK, March 17, 2026--Nautic Partners ("Nautic") announced today that it has closed the sale of portfolio company AKAM (or the "Company") to Audax Private Equity.

headline: Akamai Lands US$200 Million AI Deal Showcasing Blackwell GPU Ambitions
summary: Akamai Technologies (NasdaqGS:AKAM) announced a four year, US$200 million service agreement with a major U.S. tech company. The deal covers high performance AI compute infrastructure built on one of the world's largest NVIDIA Blackwell GPU clusters. Akamai has acquired thousands of Blackwell GPUs to expand its global distributed cloud for AI workloads. For investors watching how AI infrastructure is being built out, Akamai is positioning its core content delivery and cloud network around...
